questions.question: Explain the difference between a binary tree and a binary search tree. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Use a diagram to support your answer

questions.question: Write an algorithm to perform an in-order traversal of a binary tree. Explain the order in which nodes are visited.
questions.hint: Use a sample binary tree to test your implementation

questions.question: What is the purpose of threading a binary tree? Provide an example to illustrate how it can be used.
questions.hint: Discuss the benefits of threading in the context of binary tree applications
